name: T-Mobile US, Inc.
description: T-Mobile US, Inc. is a prominent American wireless network operator headquartered in Bellevue, Washington. As the self-proclaimed "Un-carrier," the company provides wireless voice, messaging, and data services to millions of customers across the United States. T-Mobile is widely recognized for its extensive and award-winning 5G network, which aims to connect more people in more places than ever before. While it operates as an independent publicly traded company on the NASDAQ, it maintains a significant strategic relationship with its majority shareholder, the German telecommunications giant Deutsche Telekom.
